rationale: Internal refactor consolidating pool and queue code; no spec behavior change described.
Improving CRUD spec test verification strictness in the Ruby spec runner; test infrastructure change.
Vague user-reported random auth error after upgrade; no specific spec rule identified.
Reorder BSON document fields for better log output; ergonomics improvement, no spec rule involved.
Retryable reads spec prohibits getMore retries; driver was retrying them. Spec also requires session support on retry server selection.
Refactoring spec test runners to support lists of operations; test infrastructure improvement.
Documentation update noting retryable writes are now on by default; no spec behavior.
Read concern set on client not propagated to collection operations; spec requires read concern inheritance.
Documentation recommendation about server selection timeout default; no spec behavior change.
tlsCertificateKeyFile URI option not mapped to ssl_key; spec defines this URI option mapping and driver omitted it.
Adding a new knob to disable legacy write retries; feature addition, no spec rule violated.
Combining CRUD and transaction spec test runners to share functionality; test infrastructure refactor.
SDAM error detection incorrectly reads 'code' from first result document instead of error document, causing false unknown-server transitions.
Internal refactor consolidating cluster time logic into one class; no spec behavior change.
Aggregate explain result format changed in server 4.2; driver compatibility fix, no contradicted spec rule cited.
Feature addition to support TLS certificate chains; other drivers mentioned as background context only.
Feature addition: support multiple CA certificates; TLS enhancement with no contradicted spec rule.
Adding TLS verification test coverage and documentation; no driver behavior bug.
CI infrastructure: enabling local TLS tests to run in Evergreen; no spec behavior involved.
JRuby platform bug in OpenSSL key parsing; Ruby-runtime-specific implementation issue, no spec rule violated.
Summary states ChangeStream spec's Resumable Error definition is too broad; depends on DRIVERS-650 for spec fix.
CI configuration: explicitly adding 4.2 server to Evergreen test matrix; no spec behavior.
CI configuration: adding multiple-mongos test topology in Evergreen; test infrastructure, not a spec bug.
Documentation announcing deprecation of Ruby < 2.3 support; no spec behavior.
Resync change stream spec tests for new notification types; child of DRIVERS-596, test infrastructure update.
Update change stream tests for 4.1.1 drop notifications; child of DRIVERS-504, test infrastructure update.
Depends on SPEC-1195; spec requires client-side errors not change transaction state, driver was doing so.
Ruby-internal bug in write concern option parsing (string vs symbol keys); no spec rule about Ruby type handling.
Performance optimization: caching result_class to avoid repeated class hierarchy traversal.
API ergonomics: adding validation to prohibit :journal option name in write concerns; no spec rule violated.
Server selection loop raises error when at deadline after waiting, even if server is now available; server selection spec defines the retry-wait loop behavior.
Documentation bug: transactions tutorial omitted session parameter in code examples.
Internal code cleanup: standardize on spec field name writeConcernError instead of constants; no behavior change.
API ergonomics: adding :write_concern as alternative to :write option; feature addition, no spec rule violated.
Ruby-specific symbol/string type handling for read concern level option; internal API consistency, no spec rule violated.
Adding integration test coverage for read preferences via APM events; test addition, not a bug fix.
Spec (SPEC-1292/DRIVERS-664) requires $readPreference only in replica set/sharded topologies; driver was sending it incorrectly.
Read preference set via collection #with not passed to find command; spec requires collection-level read preference be applied.
Operations like update_many use legacy retry logic when modern retryable writes enabled; spec prohibits retrying non-retryable operations.
retryWrites=false and retryReads=false URI options not honored; spec defines these URI options must disable retries.
Internal refactor of background threading code for SDAM monitor; no spec behavior change.
SPEC-1362 requires not sending multi:false/upsert:false defaults; driver was sending them, needed for crud v2 tests.
Socket resource leak if error occurs during connection setup; implementation bug, no spec rule about socket cleanup.
Update CMAP pool creation spec test to ignore ConnectionReadyEvent; child of DRIVERS-673, test infrastructure fix.
Add spec tests for deleteMany/updateMany with retryWrites=true; child of DRIVERS-574 with spec tests.
CMAP spec via DRIVERS-688 requires 'connectionError' as valid reason for ConnectionCheckOutFailedEvent; driver was missing it.
Enabling transaction spec tests on sharded cluster topology in Evergreen; test infrastructure, not a driver bug.
CRUD spec defines database-level aggregation; Ruby driver was missing this required feature entirely.
Auth mechanism URI option conversion not documented; documentation bug only.
maxStalenessSeconds URI option documentation is incorrect; documentation bug only.
